title: Gemini for Google Workspace Professionals
modules: What Gemini in Workspace Actually Does: Capabilities, Limits, and Where It Lives
Practical Workflows: Docs, Gmail, Sheets, Slides, and Meet in the Real World
Prompt Craft for Workspace Contexts: Getting Useful Output from Ambiguous Inputs
Data Privacy, Organizational Controls, and What Your Workspace Admin Sees
Building Your Personal Productivity System Around Gemini Integration
synopsis: Gemini is embedded directly into the Google Workspace tools most professionals already spend their day in — but most users interact with it superficially, missing the workflows that actually save time. This course cuts through the feature announcements and delivers a hands-on system for using Gemini across Gmail, Docs, Sheets, Slides, and Meet to produce real work faster.
rationale: Google Workspace is one of the most widely deployed productivity platforms in the world, and Gemini's deep integration means that professionals who master it gain a compounding daily advantage — yet most training treats it as a novelty rather than a workflow tool.
learning_outcome: Professionals can build and apply a personal Gemini-augmented workflow across their core Workspace tools, including appropriate use of privacy controls and prompting techniques that produce reliable, useful output.
nearest_existing: Gemini's Origins: From LaMDA to the Multimodal Era
